news.t: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
Here's why small caps are beating the S&P 500 this quarter

holdings.infoBox: PSCF is an equity ETF with a total of 166 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 2.14%, Ryman Hospitality Properties at 1.81%, Jackson Financial at 1.80%, Terreno Realty at 1.64%, and The Macerich Company at 1.64%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Financials ETF (PSCF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of financial services companies in the US small-cap market. PSCF was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Financials & Real Estate Index

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
data.text: I leverage my firm's data to identify three red flags you can use to avoid the worst ETFs.

data.title: Here's why small caps are beating the S&P 500 this quarter
data.text: Small caps are joining in on the market rally. The Russell 2000 has bounced 56% since the March bottom, outpacing the S&P 500's 46% run over the same stretch.
